Class GameObject

java.lang.Object
MyGame.GameObject.GameObject
All Implemented Interfaces:
Renderable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Chest, DamageText, Enemy, EnergyDrink, Experience, Explosion, Obstacle, Player, Projectile, Steak
public abstract class GameObject extends Object implements Renderable
The base class for all entities in the game, providing common properties like position and size.
